testcase.name: test_add_damage_charge

failure.message:
AssertionError: Expected 200, got 500: {"detail":"(pymysql.err.IntegrityError) (1062, "Duplicate entry '' for key 'PRIMARY'")
[SQL: 
                INSERT INTO product_damage_history (order_id, product_id, damage_type, qty, fee, note, created_at)
                VALUES (%(order_id)s, 0, 'manual_charge', 1, %(fee)s, %(note)s, NOW())
            ]
[parameters: {'order_id': 7396, 'fee': 50.0, 'note': 'Test damage charge - auto test'}]
(Background on this error at: https://sqlalche.me/e/20/gkpj)"}
assert 500 == 200
 +  where 500 = <Response [500]>.status_code

testcase.failure:
backend/tests/test_settlement_charges_editable.py:106: in test_add_damage_charge assert response.status_code == 200, f"Expected 200, got {response.status_code}: {response.text}" E AssertionError: Expected 200, got 500: {"detail":"(pymysql.err.IntegrityError) (1062, "Duplicate entry '' for key 'PRIMARY'")
[SQL: 
 INSERT INTO product_damage_history (order_id, product_id, damage_type, qty, fee, note, created_at)
 VALUES (%(order_id)s, 0, 'manual_charge', 1, %(fee)s, %(note)s, NOW())
 ]
[parameters: {'order_id': 7396, 'fee': 50.0, 'note': 'Test damage charge - auto test'}]
(Background on this error at: https://sqlalche.me/e/20/gkpj)"} E assert 500 == 200 E + where 500 = <Response [500]>.status_code
